title: Full platform sync — modular apps and release system
description:
Complete update for your private OVH server.

PipeSync and PipeShare now load as modular addons (Plan View with modals, segment planner, footage, pricing, daily reports, jobsite contacts, PipeShare upload queue). Backend adds platform release management, SaaS billing routes, and OVH deploy tooling.

Hard-refresh PipeSync/PipeSync after deploy (Ctrl+Shift+R).

Who is affected: Private server at 40.160.72.39. SaaS tenants unchanged until you publish and apply a platform release.
changeLog: Modular PipeSync and PipeShare frontend (manifest boot, smoke tests).
Plan View modals and ~2800 lines legacy render code removed from app.js.
Platform release API and draft notes for cPanel updates track.
SaaS billing and tenant provisioning routes (Stripe-ready).
OVH deploy scripts, GitHub Actions workflow, and performance nginx config.
Horizonpipe cPanel static pages (releases admin, billing, setup).
Portal runtime version bumped for cache bust.
